attributes.innerText:
Mr. Manish Gadhvi, CEO of Funds India in B2B Design, was looking for office furniture that doesn’t give the traditional boring vibes. And here, he got the desired fun-filled, vibrant office furniture. Impressed by the modern appeal and comfort of every piece, he also liked the coordination, delivery, and overall services of our team.

Mr. Manish Gadhvi
Bengaluru

Ms. Aarti Rajendra Shetty furnished the model flat of ‘Disha Pursuit of Elements’. From living room to master bedroom, green room to guest bedroom, every room was decorated and styled with our exclusive furniture collection. She was impressed by the design elements and the overall comfort of every piece.

Ms. Aarti Rajendra Shetty
Bengaluru

Mr. Sudheer Kumar KK and Sreedevi Madhavan, after visiting our showroom, liked our collection in just one glance. Since they chose to buy from us, they were delighted with their entire shopping experience. The services of our team and their assistance in home decor were loved by them.

Mr. Sudheer KK and Sreedevi Madhavan
Bengaluru

The moment Mr. and Mrs. Karlekar walked into the store, they instantly fell in love with the sofa set. To furnish their living room, they also bought an accent chair and bench, which they loved due to their design and functionality. Moreover, the extendable dining table set was the perfect space-savvy purchase for them.

Mr. and Mrs. Karlekar
Bengaluru

Mr. Prashant Joseph and Mrs. Clara Kurian enjoyed shopping with us due to our exclusive and trendy furniture. What they loved the most is our functional and space-efficient furniture that created a whole complementary look in the dining room, living room, and bedroom. From finish to material, every element made their purchase exceptional.

Mr. Prashant Joseph and Mrs. Clara Kurian
Bengaluru

With our interior design services, Mr. and Mrs. Agrawal were mesmerized; right from the entrance, you can see how beautifully we transformed their living room, master bedroom, modular kitchen, and kids bedroom. Be it lighting, color grading, functionality, and design, each element came together to create a space they truly adored.

Mr. Vivek and Mrs. Jigyasa Agrawal
Bengaluru

For Mr. Shravanth and Mrs. Swarnlata, each item was thoughtfully designed with child-friendly, rounded edges, ensuring safety for everyone while maintaining a classy look. According to them, every single detail was perfect, and they were thrilled with the seamless blend of style and safety in their home.

Mr. Shravanth and Mrs. Swarnlata
Bengaluru

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
What type of cotton fabric is used in the upholstery?
+
A cotton blend designed for daily seating. It stays soft against skin and handles regular contact without wearing down quickly
How easy is it to maintain the cotton upholstery?
+
Weekly vacuuming and spot cleaning with the use of a damp cloth handles most situations. Deeper cleaning every few months keeps the fabric consistent
Will it retain comfort and shape over time?
+
With basic care, yes. Rotating sitting positions and fluffing cushions occasionally helps them hold their original density longer
Is Jade Ivory difficult to keep clean?
+
It needs more attention than darker shades, but cotton responds well to prompt cleaning and is manageable with regular upkeep
Does the wooden frame need maintenance?
+
Light dusting and occasional polishing are enough. The wooden 3 seater sofa frame does not need intensive care when there are normal household conditions
Shop Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa Suitable for Laid-Back Relaxation?

Considerations Before Buying

Fabric type:

Cotton breathes better than synthetic fabric, especially during warmer months. In Indian summers, this matters more than it first appears.

Cushion firmness:

Consider whether the density smoothly matches with your household. Softer cushions feel good initially, but may need replacing sooner when there is heavy daily usage.

Room size:

A living room 3 seater sofa needs breathing room around it. So, kindly measure the same before ordering so as to avoid a cramped layout.

Light colour care:

Cotton upholstery in Jade Ivory needs vacuuming and prompt stain attention in active households.

Frame quality:

Confirm about the frame that it is solid wood rather than engineered wood with the use of a veneer finish for better long-term stability.

What Color Combinations Work Harmoniously With Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa?

The Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa does not try to do too much, and that is probably its strongest quality. It is a fabric upholstered sofa in cotton, finished in Jade Ivory, and it suits the kind of everyday use that most Indian living rooms actually see. No complicated materials, no frame that wobbles after a few months. Just a comfortable fabric sofa set that works reliably day after day.

The Jade Ivory shade does not fight with surrounding furniture. It sits alongside wooden pieces, earthy tones, and deeper accent colours like teal or forest green without trouble. Warm terracotta cushions, muted olive throws, or rust curtains pair well. It holds its ground against grey walls and light flooring too.

Does the Jade Ivory Shade Suit All Interior Styles?

Cotton fabric sofa seating does not trap heat and breathes through the day. The wooden frame on this modern wooden sofa set is stable and quiet, without creaking that lower-quality builds develop over time. Armrests sit at a practical height for most adults. Seat depth works for both upright sitting and relaxed leaning, making this sofa for living room seating usable across different household routines.

Placement Ideas

Place it along the main wall with a wooden coffee table in front. In open-plan flats, use it to anchor the seating zone. A neutral rug underneath defines the sitting area without adding any kind of visual clutter.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
What type of cotton fabric is used in the upholstery?
+
A cotton blend designed for daily seating. It stays soft against skin and handles regular contact without wearing down quickly
How easy is it to maintain the cotton upholstery?
+
Weekly vacuuming and spot cleaning with the use of a damp cloth handles most situations. Deeper cleaning every few months keeps the fabric consistent
Will it retain comfort and shape over time?
+
With basic care, yes. Rotating sitting positions and fluffing cushions occasionally helps them hold their original density longer
Is Jade Ivory difficult to keep clean?
+
It needs more attention than darker shades, but cotton responds well to prompt cleaning and is manageable with regular upkeep
Does the wooden frame need maintenance?
+
Light dusting and occasional polishing are enough. The wooden 3 seater sofa frame does not need intensive care when there are normal household conditions
Shop Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa Suitable for Laid-Back Relaxation?

Considerations Before Buying

Fabric type:

Cotton breathes better than synthetic fabric, especially during warmer months. In Indian summers, this matters more than it first appears.

Cushion firmness:

Consider whether the density smoothly matches with your household. Softer cushions feel good initially, but may need replacing sooner when there is heavy daily usage.

Room size:

A living room 3 seater sofa needs breathing room around it. So, kindly measure the same before ordering so as to avoid a cramped layout.

Light colour care:

Cotton upholstery in Jade Ivory needs vacuuming and prompt stain attention in active households.

Frame quality:

Confirm about the frame that it is solid wood rather than engineered wood with the use of a veneer finish for better long-term stability.

What Color Combinations Work Harmoniously With Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa?

The Lorenz 3 Seater Sofa does not try to do too much, and that is probably its strongest quality. It is a fabric upholstered sofa in cotton, finished in Jade Ivory, and it suits the kind of everyday use that most Indian living rooms actually see. No complicated materials, no frame that wobbles after a few months. Just a comfortable fabric sofa set that works reliably day after day.

The Jade Ivory shade does not fight with surrounding furniture. It sits alongside wooden pieces, earthy tones, and deeper accent colours like teal or forest green without trouble. Warm terracotta cushions, muted olive throws, or rust curtains pair well. It holds its ground against grey walls and light flooring too.

Does the Jade Ivory Shade Suit All Interior Styles?

Cotton fabric sofa seating does not trap heat and breathes through the day. The wooden frame on this modern wooden sofa set is stable and quiet, without creaking that lower-quality builds develop over time. Armrests sit at a practical height for most adults. Seat depth works for both upright sitting and relaxed leaning, making this sofa for living room seating usable across different household routines.

Placement Ideas

Place it along the main wall with a wooden coffee table in front. In open-plan flats, use it to anchor the seating zone. A neutral rug underneath defines the sitting area without adding any kind of visual clutter.

Choose the Right Wooden Sofa Size for Your Living Room

There are various types of wooden sofas available at Wooden Street. All have their utility and perks to buy. We have categorized all wooden sofas into mainly three categories:

1, 2 and 3 Seater Wooden Sofas

These are perfect for compact to medium spaces. A complete wooden sofa set is a combination of all the units that a sofa consists of in many different settings. A wooden sofa set comes in different configurations such as a 3-seater sofa, a two-seater sofa and single seater sofas. Now it is totally up to the customer what pattern of setting he/she want to keep in the living room.

L Shaped Sofa

Another type of sofa that remains in high demand is the L-shaped sofa. It is a smart choice for maximum saeting. A sofa that is set to cover an entire corner space of your living room with elegance. An L shape sofa can further be classified into the right-aligned sofa and left-aligned sofa. This is also up to the customer whether they want to opt for a left or right-aligned sofa set. We have all the L-shaped sofas available at Wooden Street.

3+1+1 Wooden Sofa Set

A 3+1+1 sofa set consists of one three-seater and two single-seater sofas or chairs, making it a classic and flexible choice. It offers comfortable seating for individual and multiple users and are ideal for medium to large size living rooms.

Wooden Sofa with Storage

A wooden sofa with storage is a unit with side cabinets and drawers to store all the miscellaneous things lying around at home. Although it is not and additional category but you can easily find it in every kind of Sofa.

Key Factors to Consider When Buying a Wooden Sofa Design
Space Size - The very first thing to do is, measure the size of the space, where you want to put your sofa. Compare the size with the online size of Sofa, it will help you decide exactly what size you can fit in.
Comfort - The need for comfort is the priority while buying a sofa online. The sofa is where you spend most of the day, so comfort ought to be according to your taste. The one which can support your back and posture.
Resistant Frame - It is the basic framework on which all the other material is mounted and woven. The frame of a sofa decides the resiliency of a sofa. A sofa has many layers, which combine to make a better-looking and stronger framed unit, so it can be a part of your family for even longer.
Quality of wood - Well, if we are talking about wooden sofas, then it is the most important factor in buying a wooden sofa. Check if the quality of wood is appropriate or not. Sheesham wood and Mango wood are used mostly in making a wooden sofa. They all have different colors and finishes; choose the wood accordingly.
Craftsmanship - Polishing and providing a perfect finish to a wooden sofa unit is what craftsmanship is all about. Crafting a sofa into the piece of art defines the level of craftsmanship. Check thoroughly for the imperfection in shape, size or texture.
